etymology.description: 日(日) (rì, "sun") + 屮(屮) (chè, "sprouts") -> originally sun setting into bushes -> bottom later distorted to 大(dà, "big") -> final form 莫(mò, "none")
etymology.interpretation: Originally, the character depicts the sun sinking into the bushes, denoting dusk, which marks the end of the day. This concept of an ending led to the character's extended meanings related to absence or negation, such as "none" or "not".

examples.chinese: 他的微笑令人莫名其妙(他的微笑令人莫名其妙)。
examples.pinyin: Tā de wēixiào lìng rén mòmíngqímiào.

examples.chinese: 莫忘初衷(莫忘初衷)，坚持到底(堅持到底)。
examples.english: Do not forget your original intention, and persist to the end.

examples.chinese: 这个秘密无人知晓(這個秘密無人知曉)，莫要泄露出去(莫要洩露出去)。
examples.pinyin: Zhège mìmì wú rén zhīxiǎo, mò yào xièlù chūqù.
examples.english: This secret is known to no one, do not disclose it.
